product_information.product_name: Cacharel Amor Amor eau de toilette 30 ML
product_information.description: Een bloemige geur met noten van o.a. sinaasappelbloesem, citroen, lavendel, jasmijn, amber, muskus.

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: ALCOHOL, PARFUM / FRAGRANCE, AQUA / WATER, TRIETHYL CITRATE, LIMONENE, ETHYLHEXYL METHOXYCINNAMATE, LINALOOL, HYDROXYCITRONELLAL, BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE, ETHYLHEXYL SALICYLATE, CITRONELLOL, CITRAL, COUMARIN, BHT, CINNAMAL, GERANIOL, EUGENOL, CI 14700, CI 60730.
